content.text: The commenting feature commit (`630f482`) changed `WorkshopGallery.css`, `newhome.css`, and `page.tsx`. Let me see what specifically changed.

input.command: cd "C:\Users\chait\OneDrive\Desktop\Project-Shilamurthi" && git diff 5eea8e2..630f482 -- storefront/src/app/WorkshopGallery.css storefront/src/app/newhome.css storefront/src/app/page.tsx
input.description: Show CSS and page changes in commenting commit

content.text: Found the issue. Let me see the full extent of the conflicting CSS in newhome.css.

Here's the problem. **`newhome.css` has stale, conflicting gallery styles (lines 290-580) that override `WorkshopGallery.css`'s video layout.**

Key conflicts causing videos to be invisible on desktop:

| Class | `newhome.css` (overrides) | `WorkshopGallery.css` (intended) |
|-------|---------------------------|----------------------------------|
| `.gallery-visual-col` | just `flex: 1; width: 100%` — no overflow/height | `display: flex; overflow: visible; min-height: 100%` |
| `.gallery-item-row` | `align-items: center; flex-direction: column` | `align-items: stretch; min-height: 110vh` |
| `.workshop-container` | `max-width: 80rem` | `max-width: 1400px` |
| `.gallery-text-col` | `text-align: center`, no flex layout | `display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center` |

Without `align-items: stretch` and `min-height: 110vh` on the row, the visual column has zero height, so the absolutely-positioned video wrapper has no height reference and videos are invisible.

The fix: remove all stale gallery styles from `newhome.css` and move the one used class (`.workshop-gallery-mist`) to `WorkshopGallery.css`.

content.content: The file C:\Users\chait\OneDrive\Desktop\Project-Shilamurthi\storefront\src\app\newhome.css has been updated successfully.

content.text: Let me verify the final state of both files.

Both files look clean. Here's what was wrong and what I fixed:

**Root cause**: `newhome.css` contained ~290 lines of stale gallery styles (from an earlier design iteration) that **overrode** `WorkshopGallery.css` through CSS cascade. The critical overrides:

1. **`.gallery-visual-col`** lost `display: flex`, `overflow: visible`, and `min-height: 100%` — the video wrapper (absolutely positioned) had no parent height, making videos invisible on desktop
2. **`.gallery-item-row`** was forced to `flex-direction: column` and `align-items: center` instead of `stretch` + `min-height: 110vh` — rows collapsed to zero visual-column height
3. **`.gallery-text-col`** lost its flex layout and was center-aligned instead of left-aligned
4. **`.workshop-container`** had a different max-width
5. **`.gallery-btn-text`** was set to `color: transparent` (old gradient-clip design) overriding the current solid text

**Fix**: Removed all 290 lines of duplicate gallery styles from `newhome.css` and moved the one class that was only there (`.workshop-gallery-mist`) into `WorkshopGallery.css` where it belongs. Now `WorkshopGallery.css` is the single source of truth for gallery/video styling.
